headline: Discover the top S&P500 movers in Wednesday's pre-market session.
summary: Before the US market kicks off on Wednesday, let's examine the pre-market session and unveil the notable performers among the S&P500 top gainers and losers.

headline: Teradyne (NASDAQ:TER): A High Growth Stock Passing the Little Book That Makes You Rich Screen
summary: Teradyne passes Louis Navellier's eight-rule growth stock screen with strong earnings surprises, sales growth of 30.3%, and 67% EPS growth. Discover a disciplined framework for finding high-momentum stocks.
